title: Read, Unread, Star, Tag, Bulk Action, and Conflict Semantics
description: Reading an entry mutates global source state, bulk operations partially apply silently, device updates overwrite each other, tags leak across tenants, and unread counts drift. Learners cumulatively produce consistent personal reader-state model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Keep read, unread, starred, hidden, saved, and tag relationships scoped to principal, tenant, and entry without mutating shared content.
Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
